# Third-party Notices

This repository does not vendor BepInEx or Noto Sans JP. Release archives may include them.

- BepInEx: upstream project page describes the project license as LGPL-2.1. See https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx
- Noto Sans JP / Noto fonts: Noto documentation describes Noto fonts as licensed under the Open Font License. See https://notofonts.github.io/noto-docs/website/use/

Before publishing a release, include the applicable license text files from the exact BepInEx and font distributions used for that release.
